caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political commentary. The screen is divided into two sections: on the left, there is an image of a man wearing a traditional hat and glasses, who seems to be Bola Tinubu, as indicated by the text "NIGERIA NEEDS ME - BOLA TINUBU" at the bottom of the screen. On the right side, there is a smaller inset showing Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is participating in the discussion via phone. The background features a vibrant red and purple design with the PlusTV logo prominently displayed in the top left corner. The overall theme suggests a discussion or analysis of Bola Tinubu's political stance and his assertion that Nigeria needs him. The video also encourages viewers to subscribe to their YouTube channel for more content.
